Video_Constants._note: Decided ONCE per video before any scene generation. Do not re-select per scene. Declare in the Video Visual Constants block of the scene plan (Step 2). Subject selection (human, abstract, literal object) is a per-scene decision made by the Video Director based on scene content — it is not a video-level constant.

Visual_Presets.Minimal_Vector: Clean vector illustration, strong precise linework, hard-edged geometric shading, clean bezier curves, consistent line-weight, harmonious limited color palette, matte finish.
Visual_Presets.Textured_Editorial: Detailed graphic novel realism, textured linework, screen-print aesthetic, stylized gouache paint texture, warm color palette, opaque flat color blocks, hand-crafted aesthetic, visible grain finish.
Visual_Presets.Digital_Glass: Clean modern vector forms, translucent frosted-glass layers, soft vibrant gradients, sharp vector-edge highlights, contemporary UI illustration style, sleek and precise.

Technical_Specs._note: Select per scene based on the target template. The spec encodes the aspect ratio — use the matching --aspect-ratio flag when calling gemini-image-gen.py.
Technical_Specs.Graphic_Staging: Centered graphic weight, three-quarter perspective, 16:9 aspect ratio, uniform lighting, balanced negative space. → Template: header-with-image. → Flag: --aspect-ratio 16:9
Technical_Specs.Isometric_Structure: Isometric perspective with 30-degree angles, 16:9 aspect ratio, non-converging parallel lines, flat-lit surfaces. → Template: header-with-image (best for technical/spatial concepts: servers, networks, data structures, systems, architecture). → Flag: --aspect-ratio 16:9
Technical_Specs.Vertical_Hierarchy: Vertical portrait composition, 9:16 aspect ratio, bottom-to-top visual flow, flat orthographic rendering. → Templates: two-column-quote-with-image, bullets-with-image. → Flag: --aspect-ratio 9:16

Defaults._note: Include ALL FOUR of these in every prompt without exception. They are not choices — they are always-on guardrails.
Defaults.Clean_Design: A clean, wordless design entirely devoid of letters, numbers, or symbols. Surfaces are smooth and uncluttered.
Defaults.Simple_Environment: A minimalist environment with large areas of empty space. The composition is focused and free of distracting background elements.
Defaults.Slide_Safe_Zone: All essential action and subjects are strictly contained within the inner 60% of the frame. The outer margins remain empty.
Defaults.Complementary_Palette: Muted, desaturated tones in all background and environmental elements. Saturated color is reserved for the primary subject only. The overall palette harmonizes with a teal and purple branded interface without competing.

Optional_Modifiers._note: Add situationally — pick only what the scene genuinely needs. Do not add all of them.
Optional_Modifiers.Sequence_Anchor: The setting, lighting temperature, character design, and color treatment must visually match the sequence established in this video's earlier scenes. Reuse the same environment and subject appearance.
Optional_Modifiers.Dynamic_Action: The primary subject is in active motion or mid-gesture, conveying energy, movement, and forward momentum.
Optional_Modifiers.Calm_Focus: The primary subject is still and composed, conveying concentration, stability, or quiet clarity.
Optional_Modifiers.Isometric_Detail: Rich isometric scene with layered depth: foreground subject, midground environment, and simplified background plane. Each layer is clearly separated by elevation.
